about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a developer with two years of experience. While I have foundational skills in frontend technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React, my expertise and passion lie primarily in Flutter development. I have been building high-quality, scalable mobile applications with Flutter, consistently delivering exceptional user experiences and collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams. I'm always eager to enhance my skills and tackle new challenges in the world of software development.
